title: Avatar · New component
content:
Avatar is a new component in Green Design System for representing people and entities across your product.

Whether you have a photo, a name, or nothing at all — Avatar handles it gracefully. It shows the image if one is provided, falls back to initials or short text if not, and uses a default profile icon as a last resort. No extra setup needed.

## Shapes

Avatar comes in two shapes: **circular** for people, and **square** for non-person contexts like teams, bots, or brands.

## Sizes

Four sizes are available — **xs**, **s**, **m**, and **l** — so Avatar fits whether you need it in a tight list or as a prominent profile display.

## Badge support

Need to show a notification count or a status indicator on top of an avatar? Drop a badge into the badge slot and it appears in the top-right corner automatically.

## Grouping

Avatars can be grouped together. The overlapping ring cutout effect is handled by the component — just stack them and it works. For overflow cases like a long member list, add an extra avatar with text like “+5” and the visual treatment stays consistent.

---

Avatar is available in Figma and documented at seb.io/component/avatar.
